svg.title: Dating 2046 Futures Wheel — Radial v7
svg.desc: Radial three-ring futures wheel v7. CE1 repositioned upward-left for breathing room with Node 6.
svg.text: Ring 1 (STEEP): A=T+S, B=Environmental, C=Political, D=Economic, E=Social.
Ring 3 pie tag: blue=Projected, green=Preferred, red=Preposterous. Connection Club artifact = Ring 3 nodes 3 + 6.
Ring 2 inherits parent color. Short labels on figure; full labels in compendium legend.
